title: No Woman No Cry
album: One Love, The Very Best Of
why_this_song: No Woman No Cry by Bob Marley (1974) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 32 times; first heard in: "No woman no cry"
Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Everything's gonna be alright"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "So dry your tears I say"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Oh my Little sister, don't she'd no tears"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Oh my Little sister, don't she'd no tears"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "woman" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "woman" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "alright" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "alright" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And then Georgie would make the fire light

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Bob Marley one question about "No Woman No Cry", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Bob Marley sobre "No Woman No Cry", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "No Woman No Cry" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "No Woman No Cry" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "No Woman No Cry" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "No Woman No Cry" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
